signals.headline: US x Iran Permanent Peace Deal by June 30 at 66% Yes | YES (Favored) | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US x Iran Permanent Peace Deal by June 30 at 66% Yes | YES (Favored) | MED confidence**  
This high-volume market ($17M) prices June 30 at 66% Yes for a permanent US-Iran peace deal, with May 31 at 55%; related markets like "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by April 30" at 35% suggest traders see mid-year de-escalation as likely but not certain.[1][4]

Israel x Hezbollah Ceasefire by June 30 at 100% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market assigns 100% odds to an Israel x Hezbollah ceasefire by June 30, 2026, reflecting strong trader consensus amid $161.4M total X market volume; real-time odds shift with trades, signaling potential resolution or new info driving sentiment.[1]
